title: Dismantle trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Dismantle trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for tree removal

pcs.text: Determine access to site and confirm approval for works to commence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine access to site and confirm approval for works to commence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine access to site and confirm approval for works to commence.

pcs.text: Confirm site preparations, including notification of stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site preparations, including notification of stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site preparations, including notification of stakeholders.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), and record and implement site-specific control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), and record and implement site-specific control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA), and record and implement site-specific control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Inspect tree to identify structural defects and appropriate removal methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect tree to identify structural defects and appropriate removal methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect tree to identify structural defects and appropriate removal methods.

pcs.text: Determine a dismantling strategy identifying potential drop or lowering zones and providing safety zones for load, tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine a dismantling strategy identifying potential drop or lowering zones and providing safety zones for load, tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine a dismantling strategy identifying potential drop or lowering zones and providing safety zones for load, tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Review dismantling strategy with work crew and adjust according to feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review dismantling strategy with work crew and adjust according to feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review dismantling strategy with work crew and adjust according to feedback.

pcs.text: Protect property and vegetation assets in the work zone from potential damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Protect property and vegetation assets in the work zone from potential damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Protect property and vegetation assets in the work zone from potential damage.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of emergency response resources and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of emergency response resources and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of emergency response resources and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery and conduct pre-operation and safety checks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery and conduct pre-operation and safety checks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare tools, equipment and machinery and conduct pre-operation and safety checks.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for tree removal

elements.title: Design and prepare rigging system

pcs.text: Design rigging system according to dismantling strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design rigging system according to dismantling strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design rigging system according to dismantling strategy.

pcs.text: Select appropriate anchor and attachment points
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate anchor and attachment points?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate anchor and attachment points.

pcs.text: Estimate force applied to tree structure and to rigging equipment during planned rigging operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate force applied to tree structure and to rigging equipment during planned rigging operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate force applied to tree structure and to rigging equipment during planned rigging operations.

pcs.text: Design rigging system to allow for load, impact of force and structural integrity of tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Design rigging system to allow for load, impact of force and structural integrity of tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design rigging system to allow for load, impact of force and structural integrity of tree.

pcs.text: Consider breaking strength, working load limits and safety factor of equipment in use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consider breaking strength, working load limits and safety factor of equipment in use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consider breaking strength, working load limits and safety factor of equipment in use.

pcs.text: Discuss and confirm rigging system with work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss and confirm rigging system with work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and confirm rigging system with work team.

pcs.text: Select rigging equipment, inspect for defects, and repair, replace or remove from service damaged components according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select rigging equipment, inspect for defects, and repair, replace or remove from service damaged components according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select rigging equipment, inspect for defects, and repair, replace or remove from service damaged components according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble and configure rigging equipment into selected rigging system and install at anchor point
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble and configure rigging equipment into selected rigging system and install at anchor point?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble and configure rigging equipment into selected rigging system and install at anchor point.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Design and prepare rigging system

elements.title: Implement dismantling of trees

pcs.text: Coordinate and sequence work with work team during operations using communication methods agreed with work team for site environment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate and sequence work with work team during operations using communication methods agreed with work team for site environment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate and sequence work with work team during operations using communication methods agreed with work team for site environment.

pcs.text: Access tree crown safely according to dismantling strategy and workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access tree crown safely according to dismantling strategy and workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access tree crown safely according to dismantling strategy and workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Select and apply rigging or dismantling techniques in correct sequence to dismantle tree according to determined dismantling strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and apply rigging or dismantling techniques in correct sequence to dismantle tree according to determined dismantling strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and apply rigging or dismantling techniques in correct sequence to dismantle tree according to determined dismantling strategy.

pcs.text: Plan each cut and install rigging equipment according to rigging system design and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan each cut and install rigging equipment according to rigging system design and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan each cut and install rigging equipment according to rigging system design and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Check rigging assembly is correctly installed and safe to use prior to performing cut
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check rigging assembly is correctly installed and safe to use prior to performing cut?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check rigging assembly is correctly installed and safe to use prior to performing cut.

pcs.text: Accurately apply a selection of cuts to achieve directional felling and controlled rigging and dismantling of the tree crown and trunk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Accurately apply a selection of cuts to achieve directional felling and controlled rigging and dismantling of the tree crown and trunk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Accurately apply a selection of cuts to achieve directional felling and controlled rigging and dismantling of the tree crown and trunk.

pcs.text: Perform cuts from a safe and secure work position using industry standard cutting techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform cuts from a safe and secure work position using industry standard cutting techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform cuts from a safe and secure work position using industry standard cutting techniques.

pcs.text: Monitor and adjust dismantling process as required to maintain a safe and efficient workflow
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and adjust dismantling process as required to maintain a safe and efficient workflow?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and adjust dismantling process as required to maintain a safe and efficient workflow.

pcs.text: Dismantle tree by sections into drop zone according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dismantle tree by sections into drop zone according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dismantle tree by sections into drop zone according to industry standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement dismantling of trees

elements.title: Complete tree removal activities

pcs.text: Clean, check, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, check, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, check, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Report completion of tree removal to stakeholder
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report completion of tree removal to stakeholder?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report completion of tree removal to stakeholder.
